name: ChatGLM-6B
license: Apache-2.0 (code); ChatGLM-6B Model License for weights (free for research; free commercial use after registration)
note: Pivotal open bilingual (EN/ZH) dialogue model runnable on consumer GPUs via INT4 (6GB); China's early open ChatGPT-style release.

results.notes: From the official ChatGLM2-6B repo's head-to-head evaluation table (which reports first-gen ChatGLM-6B alongside ChatGLM2-6B); few-shot answer-only, average across STEM/Social Sciences/Humanities/Others subsets.

Few-shot CoT (English GSM8K), from the official ChatGLM2-6B repo comparison table. Slightly below the taxonomy's typical floor (5) but this is the verbatim published figure for the very weak first-gen model.
Few-shot CoT, from the official ChatGLM2-6B repo comparison table. Below the taxonomy's typical floor (30) but verbatim as published.
From Table 1 of the official 2024 GLM family technical report, which re-evaluated ChatGLM-6B/2/3 under one consistent harness for a family comparison.
GLM team's family-wide technical report re-evaluation table (Table 1).

GLM team's family-wide technical report re-evaluation table (Table 1); below the taxonomy's typical floor but verbatim as published for this early weak model.
Near-floor score reported verbatim in Table 1 of the GLM family technical report; ChatGLM-6B had essentially no code-generation ability in this harness.

verificationNotes: Confirmed exactly: release date March 14, 2023 per the official ChatGLM technical report arXiv:2406.12793 ("went live on chatglm.cn" that date). GitHub README confirms VRAM table FP16=13GB / INT4=6GB verbatim, and ~2048 token effective context. License wording ("completely open for academic research, free commercial use after questionnaire") confirmed verbatim in README, refining the raw MODEL_LICENSE text which itself doesn't mention registration. C-Eval score 38.9 confirmed verbatim in Table 3 of arXiv:2305.08322 (ar5iv). No changes made.
